chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1978 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case (Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 7770/25 3.For hearing of main case 16-12-2025 Mr. Abdul Baqi Jan Kakar, Advocate for the petitioners. M/s Agha Athar Pathan, Assistant A.G Assistant A.G and Raza Muhammad, APG a/w SIP Rana Shoukat Ali of P.S, Kharadar-Karachi. **** The Investigating Officer is present and files statement, taken on record and copy whereof is provided to counsel for the petitioners. He submits that the case has now been challaned. After such statement, counsel for petitioners, under instructions, does not press instant petition and submits that for redressal of their grievance, the petitioners will approach the trial Court for an appropriate relief, provided under the law. Order accordingly. Instant petition along with listed application(s) stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
